assertions.title: Build endpoint triggers real file generation

steps.action: Capture output file list before build and call POST /api/build
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with version info and non-empty files_written indicating generated files

steps.action: Compare output file list before/after build
steps.expected: Newly generated files appear on disk
steps.observed: new_output_file_count=0 and no new files detected

assertions.issues: Build returned success but did not report or produce newly generated files during this validation run.

assertions.title: Generator is invoked during codegen step 8

steps.action: Run mock Act3 Step 8 executor using demo Solution Space data (mix run --no-start val_gen_009.exs)
steps.expected: Generated output contains CRUD artifacts (types.ts, routes.ts, migration.sql, tests.test.ts)
steps.observed: Step 8 produced only output/*/lib/demo/from_step8.ex files; required CRUD artifacts all false

assertions.issues: Step 8 execution did not emit CRUD generator artifact files in the validated run.

assertions.title: CRUD generation records traceability links

steps.action: GET /api/traceability baseline, POST /api/build, then GET /api/traceability again
steps.expected: Entity traceability includes implementation, type, migration, and test links for each entity
steps.observed: No entities had all four required link types; build response also reported files_written_count=0

assertions.issues: Traceability entries for entities were missing required CRUD link types (type/migration/test coverage incomplete).

assertions.title: CRUD generator handles entity with multiple relationships

steps.action: Generate CRUD artifacts for an entity spec with belongs_to + many_to_many relationships
steps.expected: Migration includes foreign keys or join table; routes include nested resource endpoints; TS includes relationship fields
steps.observed: TS relationship fields were present and migration had REFERENCES, but has_join_table=false and has_nested_routes=false

assertions.issues: Generator did not produce relationship-aware nested routes and did not create a join-table migration artifact for many-to-many metadata.

assertions.title: Pipeline persistence file is valid YAML

steps.action: Execute Step 1-3 flow calls (vibe/domain start/input/extract) and capture pipeline state file
steps.expected: Pipeline persistence file exists and is valid YAML
steps.observed: All flow calls returned HTTP 200; .bropilot/pipeline_state.yaml present and parse succeeded

steps.expected: YAML parses and includes status entries for step1..step8
steps.observed: yaml_parse=ok and step_status_keys included all 8 steps

frictions.description: POST vibe/domain flow calls returned ok=true, but /api/status step_statuses remained step1..step7 pending and step8 in_progress in this shared runtime.
frictions.resolution: Recorded behavior in evidence and validated VAL-CROSS-044 via direct YAML parse and step key presence checks.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-CROSS-044), 4 failed (VAL-CGEN-009, VAL-GEN-009, VAL-CROSS-031, VAL-CROSS-035), 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
